name: system-admin-mcp
description: FastMCP 3.2 server for elevated Windows system administration: NTFS file recovery, security/ACL management, disk maintenance, service orchestration, process diagnostics, and system health monitoring with a React web dashboard.

tools.name: system_admin
tools.description: Consolidated portmanteau for 40+ Windows system operations: file recovery, security/permissions, disk maintenance, diagnostics, services, processes, startup, taskbar.

tools.name: manage_filesystem_watch
tools.description: Manage background filesystem monitoring via watchdog. Start/stop/list watches and retrieve captured events.

tools.name: get_comprehensive_diagnostics
tools.description: Perform a full system health audit: CPU/RAM/disk metrics, top processes, event log errors, volume usage.

tools.name: agentic_system_workflow
tools.description: SEP-1577 sampling-driven multi-step admin workflow. Uses ctx.sample() to orchestrate autonomous diagnostics.

tools.name: autonomous_system_troubleshooter
tools.description: Three-phase autonomous diagnosis: health/events/processes scan, sampling analysis, root cause identification.

tools.name: list_volumes
tools.description: List all available volumes with drive letter and type.

tools.name: get_file_owner
tools.description: Get the owner of a file or directory including SID.

tools.name: recover_file
tools.description: Attempt NTFS file recovery for a deleted file.

tools.name: get_disk_usage
tools.description: Get disk usage information for a path.

tools.name: get_process_info
tools.description: Get information about a running process by PID.

tools.name: ping
tools.description: Basic connectivity check for the MCP server.

tools.name: get_system_info
tools.description: Get comprehensive system information (OS, hardware, environment).

tools.name: help
tools.description: Get help on available tools and their usage.

tools.name: status
tools.description: Get server status and health information.

tools.name: list_startup_programs
tools.description: List programs that start with Windows from registry and startup folder.

tools.name: add_startup_program
tools.description: Add a program to Windows startup (HKCU or HKLM).

tools.name: remove_startup_program
tools.description: Remove a program from Windows startup.

tools.name: get_taskbar_settings
tools.description: Get current taskbar autohide and lock settings.

tools.name: set_taskbar_autohide
tools.description: Enable or disable taskbar autohide via PowerShell.
